title: Artifact: Structural Dependency Analysis for Masked NTT Hardware
description: Reproduction artifacts for arXiv:XXXX.XXXXX. Contains SMT-based structural dependency verification pipeline (D0/D1 + FM + Boolean SADC + Arithmetic SADC), formal proof suite (T1-T6, Z3/CVC5), and experimental evidence for production-scale masking verification of post-quantum cryptographic accelerators.
